story.text:
# 📖 ⿻ Act VII: Teachers Before Drake
**act** · shared · knowledge · plurality

The Teachers Before the Drake. Simmel, Dewey, Ostrom, Arendt, Allen.
> *The architect studies those who built before them—not to copy, but to understand. So too must builders of ⿻ study those who saw plural before the tools existed to embody it.*
